resources.string: Bilingual Reader
Account Email Address
jane@example.com
Send Reset Code
Resend code in %ds
Return to Login Portal
Please specify an email address to send instructions.
Please enter a valid format for email address.
Reset code sent to %s! Please check your verification dialog/inbox.
No internet connection detected. Please verify your WiFi or mobile network is active and try again.
A 6-digit verification code has been successfully generated and sent to %s.
Enter 6-Digit Verification Code
Invalid verification code. Please try again or request a new one.
Too many failed attempts. This email reset function is locked for security. Please request a new code to retry.
Invalid verification code. %d attempts remaining before full security lockout.
Create New Password
Confirm New Password
Your password has been successfully reset! You can now access your account with the new credentials.
The entered passwords do not match. Please re-type and try again.
Password must be at least 6 characters for adequate protection.
